title: Visual-QA lens return (Phase 4)
description: Validates one visual-QA lens agent's return inside the parallel lens panel (SPEC-workflow-phases-2-5.md §4b). One lens (text-overflow+collision, logo+color-conformance, edge-clipping+empty-space, or cross-slide-consistency) inspects rendered slide PNGs and returns its defects plus a per-lens verdict. FLAG-only by contract (invariant #2): a lens reports what it sees; it never rewrites a slide. Any 'fail' blocks the done announcement, but the lens does not author the fix — the orchestrator surfaces the defects at the existing hard gate. The panel reads local PNGs only (engine: workflow-tool, paid: false); no Perplexity, no paid MCP. additionalProperties:false at every level so an extra key (notably 'replacement_text') fails structurally rather than slipping through.

lens.description: The lens this return belongs to, e.g. text-overflow+collision, logo+color-conformance, edge-clipping+empty-space, cross-slide-consistency. Free-text so the panel can add lenses without a schema bump; the orchestrator supplies the lens name at dispatch.

defects.description: Every defect this lens found. Empty array means the lens saw nothing wrong; pair an empty array with verdict 'pass'. The lens lists defects only — it never proposes corrected text or a re-rendered slide (FLAG-only).

category.description: Short defect class, e.g. text-overflow, element-collision, off-brand-color, edge-clipping, logo-misplacement, inconsistency.

description.description: What is wrong and where on the slide. State the observation; do not state the replacement (FLAG-only).

slide.description: 1-based slide number the defect appears on. Omit for cross-slide-consistency findings that belong to no single slide.

verdict.description: This lens's gate verdict. 'fail' on any defect this lens judges blocking; the orchestrator blocks the done announcement on any lens returning 'fail'. The verdict is the lens's signal to the human gate, not an auto-advance.
